use_cases: Decorative animated background for hero sections on landing pages
Visual atmosphere layer for SaaS dashboard or marketing sites
Premium ambient effect for video conferencing or streaming overlays
Engaging background for portfolio or creative showcase pages
ai_summary: An animated background component featuring three glowing neon orbs with rotating beam effects on a dark backdrop. The orbs animate on mount with smooth fade and translate transitions, creating a premium, ethereal visual atmosphere suitable for hero sections or full-page backgrounds. Optimized for creating visual impact in dark-themed interfaces.
